## Summary

Describe the user-visible and technical change.

## Verification

- [ ] `make check` passes locally.
- [ ] Added or updated focused tests.
- [ ] Updated README/docs/release checklist when behavior or release scope changed.
- [ ] Reviewed `git diff` for generated files, secrets, BLE addresses, and session data.
- [ ] Recorded manual AppKit/BLE evidence if this changes native UI, connection, or export behavior.

## Risk and follow-up

State compatibility risks, deliberately deferred work, or `None`.
